overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic neon-lit city. The character traverses sidewalks, crosses wide intersections with colorful LED overhead structures, and walks past various storefronts and pedestrians in a high-density urban environment with bright sunlight and long shadows.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk beside large white industrial building

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the orange-textured sidewalk next to a tall white concrete wall, approaching a colorful intersection

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking ahead in the same direction toward the intersection

entered.detail: tall smooth white industrial wall running along the right side of the path
distinctive orange diamond-plate textured pedestrian walkway
futuristic building facade with curved horizontal LED strips displaying rainbow colors
tall yellow industrial light pole with fixtures

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a character walking along a narrow orange-textured sidewalk beside a massive white industrial wall. Ahead, a futuristic building with curved colorful LED strips spans across the street. The lighting is bright morning sun casting long shadows across the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: wide urban intersection with overhead LED installation

events.description: character steps off the sidewalk and begins crossing the wide street intersection
overhead LED strips change color from green-yellow-red to purple-pink-blue

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection on yellow-striped crosswalk, moving toward the colorful LED structure

notable_agents.action: futuristic car driving past the crosswalk from left to right

entered.detail: broad pedestrian crossing with bold yellow stripes and red text markings
dark asphalt street surface with vehicle traffic
dark-colored futuristic vehicle parked at the curb

segments.scene_description: The character crosses a wide sunlit intersection marked with yellow stripes. Overhead, massive curved LED structures display shifting rainbow colors that transition to purple and pink hues. Vehicles pass by on the asphalt roads to the left and right as the character moves toward the far side of the intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway under elevated highway overpass

events.description: enters the shadowed area beneath the concrete overpass structure
exits the overpass area and turns onto a new street with open sky

agents.ego_description: walking under the concrete overpass, passing thick support pillars and emerging into a new street area

entered.detail: massive green-tinted concrete support columns for the elevated highway
external concrete staircase attached to the building facade
modern building with reflective glass windows and neon signage

segments.scene_description: The character walks beneath a massive concrete overpass where sunlight is filtered and diffused. Large support pillars line the left side while modern glass buildings with neon signs appear on the right. The ground transitions from asphalt to concrete sidewalk as the character moves through this semi-covered urban space.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with billboards and storefronts

events.description: turns corner and enters sunlit commercial street with large digital billboards
passes a parked police car with officers standing nearby

agents.ego_description: walking along the busy commercial sidewalk, passing various pedestrians and storefronts

notable_agents.action: police officer standing beside the parked police vehicle

entered.detail: tall structure with multiple digital screens displaying advertisements on a yellow support tower
futuristic police vehicle with blue neon accents parked at the curb
green and blue automated vendor booths lined along the sidewalk
tropical palm tree visible across the street

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the overpass shadow, the character enters a bright commercial street lined with digital billboards and storefronts. A police car is parked on the right with officers nearby, while vending machines and various pedestrians populate the sidewalk. The architecture features a mix of modern glass and concrete structures under clear morning light.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street with liquor store and street furniture

events.description: passes red neon storefront and abandoned furniture on the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: continuing down the sidewalk past the red liquor store and various street details, maintaining a steady pace

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in colorful top walking in the opposite direction

entered.detail: bright red building facade with neon 'LOVERING BOOZE' signage and blue door
discarded red sofa furniture sitting on the sidewalk with trash scattered around

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character walking past a distinctive red 'Lovering Booze' storefront with neon signage. An abandoned red couch and urban debris litter the sidewalk. The orange textured path continues alongside the concrete sidewalk as various pedestrians walk in opposing directions and digital billboards recede into the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a high-density futuristic city, transitioning from a stark industrial corridor into a vibrant, cluttered commercial district. It begins with a character walking along an orange-textured sidewalk beside a massive white wall, moving toward a street spanned by curved, colorful LED strips under bright morning sunlight. As the character crosses a wide intersection marked with yellow stripes, the overhead structures shift through rainbow hues of purple and pink while vehicles pass on either side. The scene then shifts into the diffused light of a massive concrete overpass, passing large support pillars and glass buildings before emerging back into the brilliance of a commercial street filled with digital billboards, vending machines, and parked police cars. Finally, the camera follows the character past a red Lovering Booze storefront and urban debris, moving through a crowd of pedestrians as the neon signage and billboards recede into the background.
